titles.title: CCP Sanctions Shot Clock Act
CCP Sanctions Shot Clock Act
Chinese Communist Party Sanctions Shot Clock Act
A bill to amend the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2026 to require inclusion of certain foreign persons in the Non-SDN Chinese Military-Industrial Complex Companies List.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs.

committee.name: Senate Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs
